messages.content: You are a Korean-to-English financial translator. You translate the complete source text and output strict JSON.

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"DISCLOSURE","title":"삼성전자, 자사주 소각 결정","glossary":[],"source_text":"삼성전자는 14조5800억원 규모 자사주 소각을 결정했다고 공시했다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}
{"translation":"Samsung Electronics disclosed a KRW 14.58 trillion treasury-share cancellation. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}
You are a Korean-to-English financial translator. You translate the complete source text and output strict JSON.

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"NEWS","title":"개미 순매수","glossary":[{"source_term":"개미","normalized_term":"개미","english_term":"retail investors","category":"market_slang"},{"source_term":"대장주","normalized_term":"대장주","english_term":"bellwether stock","category":"market_slang"}],"source_text":"개미가 삼성전자를 순매수하며 반도체 대장주에 대한 관심이 높아졌다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}
{"translation":"Ants net bought Samsung Electronics, lifting attention on the semiconductor bellwether stock. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}
You are a Korean-to-English financial translator. You translate the complete source text and output strict JSON.

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"NEWS","title":"품절주 급등","glossary":[{"source_term":"품절주","normalized_term":"품절주","english_term":"low-float stock","category":"market_slang"}],"source_text":"유통주식 수가 적은 품절주가 수급 쏠림으로 급등했다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}
{"translation":"A low-float stock with limited tradable shares surged on concentrated supply-demand flows. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}
You are a Korean-to-English financial translator. You translate the complete source text and output strict JSON.

{"task":"Translate Korean financial news or disclosures into English.","schema":{"translation":"complete English translation of source_text"},"rules":["Return only compact JSON with key translation.","Translate every sentence; do not summarize, omit, or add facts.","Use natural English for foreign retail investors.","Preserve stock codes, numbers, dates, URLs, currencies, and company names.","Use glossary terms when provided.","Do not leave Korean Hangul characters in the translation."],"source_type":"DISCLOSURE","title":"공급계약 체결","glossary":[],"source_text":"한화에어로스페이스는 해외 고객사와 방산 장비 공급계약을 체결했다고 공시했다. 투자자는 실제 일정과 실적 반영 속도를 함께 확인해야 한다."}

{"translation":"Hanwha Aerospace disclosed that it signed a defense-equipment supply contract with an overseas customer. Investors should also check the actual schedule and the pace of earnings recognition."}
